title: Binance can serve Philippine traders under SEC framework, BlockShoals says
summary: Binance can serve Philippine traders under SEC framework, BlockShoals says
briefing: The exchange's Philippine return relies on an SEC sandbox arrangement that BlockShoals says permits trading access without a local VASP license.

title: Bitcoin tipped for Q3 'macro bottom' near $50K as major liquidity grab looms
summary: Bitcoin tipped for Q3 'macro bottom' near $50K as major liquidity grab looms
briefing: Bitcoin market participants may be left in "complete disbelief" as the market reverses from a liquidity grab without another major leg lower, a trader predicted.

title: Bitcoin activity nears record highs on microtransaction surge
summary: Bitcoin activity nears record highs on microtransaction surge
briefing: Near-record OP_RETURN usage is driving a surge in low-value Bitcoin transactions, pushing Bitcoin network activity close to all-time highs despite muted price action.

title: Goldman Sachs cuts year-end gold target by $500, doubting rate cuts
summary: Goldman Sachs cuts year-end gold target by $500, doubting rate cuts
briefing: Goldman Sachs revised its year-end forecast for gold to $4,900, indicating an increase from current levels, but less than previously expected.

title: AllUnity debuts SEKAU, a fully reserved Swedish krona stablecoin
summary: AllUnity debuts SEKAU, a fully reserved Swedish krona stablecoin
briefing: AllUnity launches Swedish krona-backed stablecoin SEKAU with multi-chain support, expanding its stablecoin portfolio regulated under the EU’s MiCA framework.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Algorand plans ‘broad quantum resilience’ by 2027
briefing: Algorand is planning new accounts and consensus mechanisms designed to be resistant to the cryptography-breaking threat of quantum computers.

title: Microsoft warns users of 'Crypto Clipper' malware spread via USB drives
summary: Microsoft warns users of 'Crypto Clipper' malware spread via USB drives
briefing: The malware blends data theft with remote code execution, “turning a financially motivated stealer into a lightweight backdoor,” Microsoft said.

title: Texas Brothers Plead Guilty to $8M Armed Crypto Kidnapping
summary: Texas Brothers Plead Guilty to $8M Armed Crypto Kidnapping
briefing: Isiah and Raymond Garcia held a Minnesota family at gunpoint for eight hours and forced the father to transfer over $8 million in crypto.

title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
summary: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
briefing: The asset manager's two proposed "Bitcoin DRIP" funds would hold U.S. stocks and reinvest dividends into Bitcoin, a novel ETF structure.

title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
summary: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
briefing: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.

title: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
summary: Midjourney Pivots From AI Images to Medical Imaging, Aiming to Build a Better MRI Alternative
briefing: Image generation company Midjourney is developing a full-body imaging system that combines ultrasound tech with AI smarts.

title: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
summary: CFTC Hits Celsius Crypto Fraudster Alex Mashinsky With Permanent Trading Ban
briefing: The settlement ensures that convicted Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky is unable to trade in CFTC markets or register with the regulator.

title: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
summary: Algorand Plans to Be Ready for Quantum Computing Threat by End of 2027
briefing: Quantum computing threatens the blockchain ecosystem, from Bitcoin to Ethereum and beyond, and Algorand has a plan to be prepared.

summary: Ethereum Foundation Exodus Continues as Co-Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Departs
briefing: Another key figure at the Ethereum Foundation is stepping away from her post, continuing a recent leadership exodus.

title: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
summary: Perplexity's AI Agent Now Has a Brain That Learns From Its Own Mistakes
briefing: Brain is a self-improving memory layer that tracks what Computer did, what worked, and what failed—then uses it overnight to make the next task faster and cheaper.
